titleStmt.title: SII 27.364: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 364. (A.R. No. 333 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 8) set up in the inner prākāra of Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.

It registers a gift of land by Kōṭyaṇṇa-Koṭhāri for feeding a brāhmaṇa daily in the satra attached to the Mahādēva temple of Surāla, during the period of Nāgañcha Toḷaha and his younger brother Bemmaṇañcha Toḷaha. The record is damaged at the end.
It is dated Śaka 1370, Prajāpati, Chaitra śu. 1, Thursday. In the given cyclic year corresponding to Śaka 1373 (not 1370) the tithi fell on 1451 A.D., March 4.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śi
raścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁ
bha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayādbhudaya ṣaka
varuśa sāvirada mūnuṟayeppattaneya naḍeva varttamāna
vyavahārika prajōtpatya saṁvatsarada caiyitra śu 1 gu
ru vāradalū śrīmatu sakalaguṇa saṁpaṁnarappa
nāgaṁcatoḷahara kāladali Avarataṁma beṁmaṇaṁca
ru kumāra Urattiyali naḍavakāladali sūrāla mahādē
vara saṁnidhiyalli kōṭyaṁṇa koṭhāri māḍida dharṁma
ke barada śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare śrīmahā dē
vara saṁnidhiyali māḍida dharṁma dinake Obba brāhmaṇa
ṁge tsatra naḍavadake māḍida dharṁmake Allinaḍava bāḷina
vivara hosaūra Oḷageha cittavana kayyali kō
ṭiyaṁṇa koṭhāri dhārāpūrvakavāgi mūlada
koṁḍa bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu me
kkeyiṁda paḍuva yaḷi
yana gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
